      running build_ext
      building 'greenlet._greenlet' extension
      creating build/temp.linux-x86_64-cpython-310/src/greenlet
      g++ -pthread -B /root/miniconda3/compiler_compat -Wno-unused-result -Wsign-compare -DNDEBUG -fwrapv -O2 -Wall -fPIC -O2 -isystem /root/miniconda3/include -fPIC -O2 -isystem /root/miniconda3/include -fPIC -I/root/miniconda3/include/python3.10 -c src/greenlet/greenlet.cpp -o build/temp.linux-x86_64-cpython-310/src/greenlet/greenlet.o
      error: command 'g++' failed: No such file or directory
      [end of output]
  note: This error originates from a subprocess, and is likely not a problem with pip.
  ERROR: Failed building wheel for greenlet
Failed to build greenlet
ERROR: Could not build wheels for greenlet, which is required to install pyproject.toml-based projects

Your install is failing because `greenlet` needs a C/C++ compiler to build its native extension, and `g++` isn’t installed (or not on `PATH`):

```
error: command 'g++' failed: No such file or directory
```

Fix by installing a compiler toolchain, then retry the install.

## If you’re on Debian/Ubuntu
```bash
sudo apt-get update
sudo apt-get install -y build-essential
# (optional but often useful)
sudo apt-get install -y python3-dev
```

## If you’re on Alpine
```bash
apk add --no-cache g++ musl-dev linux-headers
```

## If you’re on RHEL/CentOS/Fedora
```bash
# Fedora
sudo dnf groupinstall -y "Development Tools"
# RHEL/CentOS (older)
sudo yum groupinstall -y "Development Tools"
```

## If you’re in a Conda environment (no sudo available)
You can install a compiler via conda-forge:
```bash
conda install -c conda-forge -y gxx_linux-64
```

## Then retry
```bash
pip install greenlet
# or your original package that pulled in greenlet
pip install <your-package>
```

### Optional: avoid compiling by using wheels
If a wheel exists for your platform, this can help:
```bash
pip install --only-binary=:all: greenlet
```

If you tell me your OS/base image (e.g., `python:3.10-slim`, `alpine`, etc.) and whether you have sudo, I can give the exact minimal commands.
